mapper.insert: insert into gold ( userId, serverId, platformName, rechargeGold, reaminGold, costGold, tradeAddGold, tradeCostGold ) values ( #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serverId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{platformName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rechargeGold,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reaminGold,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{costGold,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tradeAddGold,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tradeCostGold,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
mapper.update: update gold set rechargeGold = #{rechargeGold,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reaminGold = #{reaminGold,jdbcType=INTEGER}, costGold = #{costGold,jdbcType=INTEGER}, tradeAddGold = #{tradeAddGold,jdbcType=INTEGER}, tradeCostGold = #{tradeCostGold,jdbcType=INTEGER} where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and serverId = #{serverId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
